snippet: Utilities funding is provided as a cash allocation as part of the Student Resource Package (SRP) under the School Infrastructure items. Funding is distributed through the quarterly cash grant. Utilities funding is provided for the following items. Utilities funding is not provided for the following items: Utilities expenditure should be allocated in CASES21 to: The utilities budget is based on historical spending plus indexation. It is not formula driven and therefore is not automatically adjusted to reflect changes in a school’s profile.
